name: INLAND HOMES PLC
summary: Inland Homes PLC is a UK-based housebuilder focused on brownfield regeneration. They acquire and develop under-utilised land in the South and South East of England, transforming it into residential properties and mixed-use developments. The company's business model involves land acquisition, planning, design, and construction, with the aim of delivering sustainable communities and enhancing local environments, and their headquarters are located in Beaconsfield, UK.
